title: Blueprint Menu
description: A pack made for Laynce's own Blueprint pack
body: A resource pack that changes the start menu of Minecraft, Adds Blueprint instead of Mincraft, Changes Java edition to Laynce Edition, And replaces splash text with some new ones. Meant to go along with this: [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/modpack/layncesblueprint). Please put at the top of this hierarchy: ![Selected resource packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb0764ac51479dd547a58ca9bbff0de2b898409f.png)
